nasb.text: After these things Jesus and His disciples came into the land of Judea, and there He was spending time with them and baptizing.

esv.text: After this Jesus and his disciples went into the Judean countryside, and he remained there with them and was baptizing.

cnv.text: 這事以後，耶穌和門徒來到猶太地，他和他們住在那裡，並且施洗。

ccb.text: 这事之后，耶稣和门徒前往犹太地区，在那里住下来给人施洗。

csbs.text: 这些事以后，耶稣和他的门徒们来到犹太地区，住在那里，并且给人施洗。
